name: Втроём — дома, aftercare, вечер

visual_parameters.clothing_kira: oversized grey cashmere sweater, bare legs, wet hair from shower
visual_parameters.clothing_sergey: black t-shirt, dark jeans, sitting on armrest
visual_parameters.clothing_user: dark shirt, visible only from shoulder/back
visual_parameters.pose: Kira curled on couch between two men, head resting on User's shoulder, looking at Sergey across the room with complex expression, Sergey watching them from armrest with whiskey glass, triangular tension composition
visual_parameters.lighting: soft warm lamp light, city lights through floor-to-ceiling window, deep shadows
visual_parameters.mood: aftercare, unresolved tension, fragile peace, three-way gravitational pull
visual_parameters.camera: cinematic wide shot, deep focus, triangular composition
visual_parameters.quality: 8K, film grain, warm color palette, rain on window

qwen_prompt: Athletic 24yo dark blonde curly woman with green eyes in oversized grey cashmere sweater with bare legs and wet hair from shower, curled on modern couch, head resting on shoulder of man in dark shirt (only shoulder and back visible), looking across room at 27yo athletic man with dark blonde short hair and blue eyes in black t-shirt and dark jeans sitting on armrest holding whiskey glass, soft warm lamp light with city lights through floor-to-ceiling window and rain on glass, deep shadows, triangular composition, intimate drama editorial style, cinematic wide shot, deep focus, photorealistic, 8K, film grain, warm color palette
negative_prompt: blurry, plastic skin, doll-like, deformed hands, extra fingers, oversaturated, watermark, childlike, anime, cartoon, explicit nudity, sexual act, kissing
notes: Drama editorial framing. Triangular composition (Kira center, two men on sides) tells story through space, not touch. User partially visible — maintains POV immersion.
